movie.title: The Strangers: Prey At Night (2018) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & ENG] BluRay 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDrive
movie.synopsis: The Strangers Prey At Night (2018) A family’s road trip takes a dangerous turn when they arrive at a secluded mobile home park to stay with some relatives and find it mysteriously deserted. Under the cover of darkness, three masked psychopaths pay them a visit to test the family’s every limit as they struggle to survive.
